title: fraxinus × rehderiana
intro: Fraxinus × rehderiana, also known as the Fraxinus × rehderiana or hybrid ash, is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between Fraxinus pennsylvanica (green ash) and Fraxinus mandshurica (Manchurian ash). The Fraxinus × rehderiana plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. The health benefits of this plant include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Fraxinus × rehderiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to support cardiovascular health and alleviate symptoms of fever and fatigue.
